description: FixedOutput satisfies PlanSpec requirements. Event class correctly implements __post_init__ for auto-ID generation (dataclass feature), SimpleEventBus has all required methods with proper thread-safety and error isolation. Self-identified issues in FixedOutput are incorrect - __post_init__ is automatically called in dataclasses, and no extra utility methods exist in the code.
dissenting_notes: FixedOutput's self-identified issues are factually incorrect. The __post_init__ method IS automatically called in dataclasses, and no get_listener_count or get_event_types methods exist in the provided code.
